title: aster hirtus
intro: Aster hirtus, also known as the rough-leaved aster, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aster hirtus include reducing inflammation and fever, as well as treating skin conditions and wounds. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote healing and soothe irritated tissues.
